info.title: Project Management API
info.description: API for managing projects, tickets, sprints, and team collaboration

post.description: Create a new ticket in a project. Requires title, description, and assignee.

get.description: List all tickets in the current project. Supports filtering by status, assignee, and priority.
Retrieve details of a specific ticket including comments and activity history.

patch.description: Update ticket fields like title, description, status, priority, or assignee.

delete.description: Permanently delete a ticket and all its comments. This cannot be undone.

post.description: Assign a ticket to a team member. Changes the assignee and notifies them.
Mark a ticket as closed or resolved. Sets the completion date.
Create a new project with name, description, and team members.

get.description: List all projects the current user has access to.
Retrieve project details including ticket counts, team members, and settings.

patch.description: Update project name, description, or settings.

delete.description: Delete a project and all its tickets, sprints, and data. This cannot be undone.

post.description: Invite a new user to the workspace. Sends an invitation email.

get.description: List all users in the workspace with their roles and status.
Retrieve user profile details including assigned tickets and activity.

patch.description: Update user profile, role, or permissions.

delete.description: Deactivate a user account. Reassigns their tickets to the project lead.

post.description: Add a comment to a ticket. Supports mentions and attachments.

patch.description: Edit an existing comment on a ticket.

delete.description: Remove a comment from a ticket.

post.description: Create a new sprint with start and end dates. Add tickets to plan the iteration.

get.description: List all sprints in a project with their status and progress.

post.description: Start a sprint. Moves all tickets in the sprint to 'in progress' status.
Mark a sprint as complete. Unfinished tickets move to the backlog.
Create a label for categorizing tickets. Labels have a name and color.

get.description: List all available labels in the project.
